forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then tending easterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 1 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 15.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog north of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.
